description: Detects injection risks in C++: system()/popen() calls with dynamic arguments, printf family with variable format strings. Simplified from Rust per D-07: flags all call_expression nodes (cannot filter by function name or verify literal argument without #match? predicate support).

flag.message: Function call detected -- verify system(), popen(), printf() and related functions do not receive dynamic or user-controlled arguments to prevent command injection and format string injection
